---
title: "Christian Martinez"
description: "Founder of the NYC Open Data Lab and creator of the OpenData R package ecosystem"
---

## Projects & Publications

-   **Welcome to NYC Open Data**\
    👉 ../stories/intro-to-nycOpenData.qmd

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Portfolio & Work

-   Creator of NYC Open Data Stories\
-   Creator of the NYC Open Data Student Gallery\
-   Developer of open data R package ecosystem

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Contributions to the Lab

-   Founder, NYC Open Data Lab\
-   Creator of nycOpenData and related packages\
-   Designer of reproducible teaching and publishing workflow

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Links

-   [GitHub](https://github.com/martinezc1)
-   [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/christian-a-martinez/)
-   [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0005-6026-6454)
